title: Overloaded column named "ROWID" mishandled in triggers.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fuzz_duckdb_r(a INTEGER, ROWID INTEGER);
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION fuzz_duckdb_r_ai() RETURNS VOID AS $$ BEGIN INSERT INTO fuzz_duckdb_r(a, ROWID) VALUES (NEW.a + 1, NEW.ROWID + 1);
CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_duckdb_r_ai AFTER INSERT ON fuzz_duckdb_r FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION fuzz_duckdb_r_ai();
